name: Hershey's Red Velvet Cocoa Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, mix cocoa powder with red food coloring until blended.
4. Gradually add the cocoa mixture to the creamed sugar mixture.
5. Alternately add flour, buttermilk, and salt, mixing on low speed until just combined.
6. Mix baking soda and vinegar in a small dish, then fold into the batter.
7. Pour the batter evenly into two greased and floured 9-inch cake pans.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. If desired, divide batter between three 9-inch pans and bake additional time if needed.
10. Allow cakes to cool completely before frosting.
